problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
hypothesis: If BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis is applied to subjective, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
